name: aidlc
description: AI Development Life Cycle pipeline inside Cursor — customizable SDLC with agent orchestration

aidlc.apiKey.description: Anthropic API key (fallback only — not needed when running inside Cursor IDE)

aidlc.model.description: Model for agents (only used with Anthropic fallback; Cursor SDK uses composer-2)

aidlc.modelOverride.description: Freeform model override — if set, takes precedence over the model dropdown. Enter any valid model string for your provider.

aidlc.autoApproveYolo.description: Automatically approve YOLO tasks without user confirmation

aidlc.gitignoreArtifacts.description: Add .aidlc/ to .gitignore (default: false — artifacts are committed)

aidlc.gateTimeout.description: Default timeout in seconds for gate approval (0 = no timeout)

aidlc.allowedCommands.description: Glob patterns for commands agents are allowed to run. Set to ["*"] to allow all.

aidlc.commandConfirmation.description: Require user confirmation before executing any command

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:panel
scripts.build:extension: tsup src/extension.ts src/extension/engine-bridge.ts src/engine/index.ts src/engine/pipeline/schema.ts src/engine/pipeline/loader.ts src/engine/pipeline/validator.ts src/engine/orchestrator/state-machine.ts src/engine/orchestrator/sequential.ts src/engine/orchestrator/loop-orchestrator.ts src/engine/runner/step-runner.ts src/engine/runner/auto-reviewer.ts src/engine/runner/loop-manager.ts src/engine/runner/cascade-reject.ts src/engine/agents/builtins.ts src/engine/agents/registry.ts src/engine/artifacts/skill-loader.ts --external vscode --external @cursor/sdk --format cjs --out-dir dist --clean
scripts.dev:extension: tsup src/extension.ts src/extension/engine-bridge.ts src/engine/index.ts src/engine/pipeline/schema.ts src/engine/pipeline/loader.ts src/engine/pipeline/validator.ts src/engine/orchestrator/state-machine.ts src/engine/orchestrator/sequential.ts src/engine/orchestrator/loop-orchestrator.ts src/engine/runner/step-runner.ts src/engine/runner/auto-reviewer.ts src/engine/runner/loop-manager.ts src/engine/runner/cascade-reject.ts src/engine/agents/builtins.ts src/engine/agents/registry.ts src/engine/artifacts/skill-loader.ts --external vscode --external @cursor/sdk --format cjs --out-dir dist --watch
